flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oklahoma State University-Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $10.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oklahoma State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Oklahoma State University-Main Campus are 28% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($57.4k vs $44.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Oklahoma State University-Main Campus rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (44.6% → 52.5%).
